name: RedM
description: RedM Red Dead Redemption 2 roleplay server template using ich777/redmserver. It mirrors the stable FiveM style deployment, persists server files and exposes game plus web console ports.

install.script:
#!/bin/sh
set -eu
server_root=/mnt/server/serverfiles
cfg="$server_root/server.cfg"
server_port="${SERVER_PORT:-${PORT:-30120}}"
mkdir -p "$server_root/resources"
if [ ! -s "$cfg" ]; then
  cat > "$cfg" <<EOF
endpoint_add_tcp "0.0.0.0:${server_port}"
endpoint_add_udp "0.0.0.0:${server_port}"
sv_endpointprivacy true
sv_maxclients 32
EOF
else
  if grep -q '^endpoint_add_tcp ' "$cfg"; then
    sed -i "s|^endpoint_add_tcp .*|endpoint_add_tcp \"0.0.0.0:${server_port}\"|" "$cfg"
  else
    sed -i "1i endpoint_add_tcp \"0.0.0.0:${server_port}\"" "$cfg"
  fi
  if grep -q '^endpoint_add_udp ' "$cfg"; then
    sed -i "s|^endpoint_add_udp .*|endpoint_add_udp \"0.0.0.0:${server_port}\"|" "$cfg"
  else
    sed -i "1i endpoint_add_udp \"0.0.0.0:${server_port}\"" "$cfg"
  fi
fi
printf '%s\n' 'ADPanel persistent server data root. Runtime mounts this directory to /serverdata.' > /mnt/server/README_ADPANEL.txt
chown -R 99:100 /mnt/server 2>/dev/null || true
chmod -R u+rwX,go+rX /mnt/server
